message:
fix: remove all whileInView opacity animations from war stories page

Content vanished on load because nested initial={{ opacity: 0 }} +
whileInView animations cascade-failed with the page transition wrapper.
All SectionShells now use forceReveal={true} and inner elements use
plain divs instead of motion.div with viewport-dependent reveals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
